feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Analytics Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP Analytics Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Connexion SAP LBN GTT with SAC possible ?
entry.content:
Hello,

I want to know if we can connect SAP Logistics Business Network Global Track and Trace with SAP Analytics Cloud ?
If yes, can you provide me some details please. 

Thank you,

entry.title: Percentage in cross model
entry.content:
Hi team,

I am working on a project that involves two associated models. One model contains human resources and departments, where I calculated the costs of each department divided by the total department costs (Percentage). It is important to note that the departments are organized in a hierarchy that includes resources (REC1, REC2, REC3, etc.). However, I also have a department dimension that lists the departments, but it is not being used. I should mention that I tried linking the models through this dimension, but it didn’t retrieve the calculated measure with the percentage mentioned earlier.

In the other model, I have general expenses (electricity, rent, etc.), as well as departments with specific costs and specific expenses. What I want to achieve is to multiply the general expenses by the percentage from the human resources model. Is it possible to accomplish this?

Thanks in Advance

Ganjos

entry.title: Calling same story different users different colors
entry.content: Two different users call up the same SAP Analytics Cloud Story, the diagram (chart) colors are different for both. Why is that so? The original color is green. For the other user it turns to orange and blue. What could be the reason?

entry.title: How to use Excel Add-in for SAC for public Dimension with read & write property ?
entry.content:
My requirement is to open a model's public dimension including read and write properties on excel. Is there a way to download this list fully and continue working on excel?  Currently i am doing this by copy-paste operation. But i would like to automate the process by calling from excel addin so that i dont have to navigate myself to public dimension of the model's page everytime.

When i try to call the model from excel it does not show me the read, write property which i need in my requirement.

Does anyone have a similiar experience or an idea on how to solve?

Thanks in advance!

SAP Analytics Cloud #SAC Addin for Excel

entry.title: User Creation in SAP Analytics Cloud
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

I’ve come across a strange behavior in our SAP Analytics Cloud (SAC) and was wondering if anyone else has experienced something similar or might have a solution.

The Issue: I recently created a new user, and I noticed that this user does not have the hourglass icon (symbol for “status in progress”) displayed, whereas other newly created users in the same system do show the hourglass icon.

Could this be due to a synchronization delay or possibly a bug?

entry.title: Can we pass table values as prompts to another view within a story with SAP Datasphere live con?
entry.content:
Hi,

I have a live connection from SAP Datasphere to SAC. There is a prompt for GL account, where user can select a hierarchy node when the story opens for the first time. My requirement is when the leaf node is selected from this hierarchy in the table within the story, it should open another page/popup with another view as GL leaf member as selection.

Is it possible to pass the values from table to popup filters within the story? Anyone who has faced this issue or knows the workaround in this case. Their comments would be deeply appreciated. Thanks

entry.title: Scheduled publication in SAC (SAP Analytics Cloud) scheduled to run every month end (31st) fails
entry.content:
Hi,

The scheduled publication which is supposed to run every month end (please see the image). Earlier, this used to fail sometimes but ran occasionally but now it has been failing with an open status for the last three months. Please suggest a fix to get it running every month.

Regards,

Madhu

entry.title: Incremental and full data load in SAC
entry.content:
Hello,

 

Could you please help me with how we can perform full and incremental(delta) loads in SAC.

Thank you.

entry.title: DataAction (Calculation in data action for inflation and price in different versions and dates)
entry.content: Hello team, I am working on a project where I have price and inflation. Inflation(Inflação) is in forecast, and price(preço) is in planning. What I want to do is create a data action that retrieves the price from the source year (2024) and source version (actual) and multiplies it by the inflation of the target year (2025). I have already created the data action, but it is not working. Could you help me resolve this issue?

entry.title: SAC - Previous years calculation for account dimension
entry.content:
Hi Experts, 

I have a problem in SAP Analytics Cloud SAP Analytics Cloud, data modeling with  previous years calculation for account dimension.

Modeling

I have a fact model with AccountCode and Balance information of P&L, and a Public dimension of type account that contains all the list of accounts included EBT account, on which I need to show in a dashboard the running values of last 2/3 years by month since actual year (as example if year is 2024 and I need to show 2021 / 2022 / 2023 values by month).

Dashboard

In the first attachment I created a dashboard where I show the year 2024, but I cannot find a way to calculate and show the previous years (as horizontal line I should have only the 12 months)

 

 

In the second attachment I show the Running EBT total formula I used in the dashboard

 

 

Question

How can I change or add formulas to obtain my achieve? In this case I want to show 3 lines of different colour each one about Running EBT Total of that year

 

It would be great if someone can help here! 

Thanks in advance!

entry.title: Change a property from SAC story script
entry.content:
Hello,

I am working on a script to change a property from a SAC story.

The idea is that the planner can click on the property in the table (It displays both ID and the property), and then clicks on a button "Update Property". Then a popup opens, where it automatically displays the ID in a text box and the selected property in a dropdown. When the planner clicks on the dropdown to change it, it should be prefilled with all existing values of the property in the dimension.

Is this possible?

I have the script working for the next part with "createMembers" API.

Thanks!

entry.title: SAC: combining data in dataset, model from files.
entry.content:
Hello,

new to SAC, i use trial version. I have problem when loading csv. files to the model. It's a classical example of database tables, where you have multiple tables joined by keys. 

What i want to achieve:
my example data consist basically from two master data tables airporst.csv, airlines.csv, which describe specific details for each airline or airport,  and one transaction data (also csv) flights.csv. I want to joint these three tables into one in modeller.
Flights.csv have a int foreign key airport_id and airlines_id that can be joined to airport.csv and airlines.csv tables.
It's very easy to join these three tables into one result table with sql, pandas, powerBi but impossible task in SAC. Why ? How do you combine data in modeler ? 

I saw 3 years old yt tutorial video  which shows button for merging data. However, in new SAC version this button is missing. Is this problem with trial version or general SAC problem ? 

Thank you all for aswers,

Victor

entry.title: SAP Analytics Cloud - Resolve High Impact Performance Issues
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

I’m working with Widgets in a story that are taking a long time to load. Using the Performance Analysis Tools in SAC, I identified a few possible reasons for the weak performance. Take a look at the screenshot below.

 

  1. Number of Dimension Attributes: 92
    We have dimensions with attributes, but they’re not being used in the Widget. Could these still affect performance?

  2. Number of User-Defined Variable Exits: 8
    This makes sense—more prompted variables likely increase processing time.

  3. Number of Elements in Structure 1: 50
    I’m not entirely sure what this refers to. Does it count all the dimensions and measures in the query?

  4. Number of Free Dimensions: 17
    What exactly does this refer to? Is it query-related?

I’d appreciate your insights on these four points.

Thanks in advance!

Ismail

entry.title: Customer Specific Price List - Delete Product
entry.content:
Hi,

I can insert/update Customer Specific PriceList & Products via APi /sap/bc/srt/scs/sap/managesalespricelistin2 however can't find how to delete/remove a product

Any examples please anybody ?

Thanks,

Mark

entry.title: Transfer the balance vendor invoice
entry.content: I am currently engaged in a Public Cloud project .I mistakenly raised an invoice for vendor 100008 in SAP Public Cloud, and now I need to transfer the balance to the correct vendor, 100050. Could you please guide me through the steps to perform this balance transfer

entry.title: SAP Cloud ALM and SAP Analytics Cloud
entry.content:
Hi,

We have successfully connected the Cloud ALM with Analytics Cloud to get more detailed analytics from an implementation project. We can see the tables (e.g. requirements, tasks, tests) etc in SAC, but we haven't been able to figure out where the associations are stored.

For example we like to query all the requirements and see all tasks associated to them. Can anyone help us and let us know where the associations between the tables are held?

Thanks

Thomas

entry.title: SAC Backend-Login Popup changed to Browser Dropdown
entry.content:
Dear Community

Recently a login behavior has changed in the SAC. This is about the standard SAC internal popup when logging in to a backend system via live connection without SSO, since recently and only on a specific SAC tenant the user details are now requested with a browser Dropdown.

As it used to be:

How it is now:

 

any idea why?

Backend is S4 private Cloud

SAP Analytics Cloud 

Greetings Cornelius

entry.title: SAP Analytics cloud embedded in SAP Business One on premise
entry.content:
Good afternoon,

The client has requested the possibility of displaying a story created in SAC within Business One. We assume it would need to be done with Single Sign-On so that it automatically connects the SAP user to SAC.

We have serious doubts about whether this is feasible. Does anyone know how this could be achieved? If it is possible, would the security applied in SAC through DACs in the dimensions remain intact when embedding it in Business One?

Thank you very much in advance.

Best regards.

entry.title: Would require vendor short pay enhancement configuration step in SAP S4 HANA
entry.content:
Hi Team,

Could you please provide configuration steps for vendor short pay enhancements which can be done in SAP S4 HANA? also kindly provide videos with regards to this topic.

Regards,

Chinnavva

entry.title: SAC - Input control Date range - Setting ranges
entry.content:
Hello,

when i try to set an earlier date then the start date the selection for the end date is not possible.

I cant confirm the date and the calendar remains open.

I receive the error "The start date cannot be later than the end date.

 

Is there any way to fix this?

 

Kr
